overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting a character in period clothing walking through a rainy night in a historic Old West town. The character traverses from a grassy tram median onto cobblestone streets, passing illuminated buildings and encountering a tram and horse-drawn carriage.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy median between tram tracks in historic district

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the grassy median between tram tracks in heavy rain, heading toward the lit street ahead

entered.detail: two-story stone and wood buildings with balconies and lit windows
commercial buildings with signage and decorative lighting
metal rails embedded in the ground flanking the grass path
grassy strip between the tram tracks with small bushes
tall cast-iron lamps emitting warm yellow light through the rain
mature trees with white-painted trunks lining the left side
mature trees with dense foliage lining the right side

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a grassy median flanked by tram tracks, surrounded by historic two-story buildings with balconies. Heavy rain falls under the glow of street lamps, with trees lining both sides of the path.

events.description: an illuminated tram passes by on the right side moving parallel to the character

agents.ego_description: stepping onto the cobblestone street and continuing forward as a tram passes nearby

notable_agents.action: tram moving along tracks parallel to the character, illuminated from within with visible passengers

entered.detail: wet cobblestone road surface reflecting the warm glow of street lights

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto a cobblestone street as the grassy median ends. A lit tram passes by on the right, moving along its tracks, while rain continues to fall heavily on the wet stones.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic commercial street with balconies and theater marquee

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the narrow cobblestone street, passing under balconies and alongside illuminated storefronts

entered.detail: ornate wooden balconies with railings projecting from the upper floors of buildings
building with bright marquee lights and string bulbs illuminating the facade
line of trees reappearing along the right sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character continues down the narrow cobblestone street lined with historic buildings featuring projecting balconies and illuminated windows. A brightly lit theater building dominates the right side, with trees lining the sidewalk as rain creates reflections on the wet stones.

events.description: horse-drawn carriage emerges from the mist ahead and passes by on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as a horse-drawn carriage approaches and passes by on the right side

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with two horses and driver moving toward and then past the character on the right

segments.scene_description: As the character approaches an intersection, a horse-drawn carriage emerges from the rainy mist ahead, passing by on the right side of the street. The cobblestone street continues between historic buildings as the rain maintains its steady fall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy historic town, transitioning from a lush tram median into a dense cobblestone streetscape. It begins with the character walking along a grassy path flanked by tram tracks and two-story buildings under the glow of street lamps. As the greenery ends, the camera follows the character onto wet cobblestones just as a lit tram passes by on the right. The scene then expands down a narrow street lined with illuminated windows and projecting balconies, passing a brightly lit theater that casts reflections across the rain-slicked ground. Finally, the path leads toward an intersection where a horse-drawn carriage emerges from the misty rain and passes by the character.
